member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.CreateDiscourseThread
member.summary: Command to create a new contribution thread.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.CreateDiscourseThread.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command to create a new contribution thread.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.CreateDiscourseThreadHandler
member.summary: Handles the creation of a new contribution thread in the discourse system.
Creates a new discourse thread for the specified entity, or returns the ID of an existing one.
member.param: The command containing the entity type and ID to create a thread for.
The read-only query session for checking existing threads.
The repository for discourse thread aggregates.
The unit of work for persisting changes.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ID of the created or existing discourse thread.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContribution
member.summary: Represents a contribution posted by a participant, associated with a specific entity and optionally replying to another contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContribution.ThreadId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the thread to post to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContribution.AuthorId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the participant posting the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContribution.Content
member.summary: Gets the content of the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContribution.ParentContributionId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the parent contribution, if this is a reply to another contribution.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContribution.#ctor(System.String,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.String,BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionId)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PostContributionToThread class.
member.param: The ID of the thread to post to.
The ID of the participant posting the contribution.
The content of the contribution.
The ID of the parent contribution, if this is a reply.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Commands.PostContributionHandler
member.summary: Command handler for posting contributions to specific discourse threads.
Handles the post contribution to thread command.
member.param: The command to handle.
The discourse thread repository.
The contribution repository.
Unit of work for committing changes.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ID of the created contribution.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionRepliesView
member.summary: Response model for contribution replies (maintains API compatibility).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionRepliesView.ContributionId
member.summary: The ID of the parent contribution these replies belong to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionRepliesView.Replies
member.summary: The cursor-paginated replies to this contribution.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply
member.summary: Individual reply in the response.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.AuthorId
member.summary: The ID of the participant who authored this reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.AuthorPseudonym
member.summary: The pseudonym of the author.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.Content
member.summary: The content of the reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the reply was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.ParentContributionId
member.summary: The ID of the contribution this reply responds to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.Replies
member.summary: Always empty for one-level loading (API compatibility).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.ReplyCount
member.summary: The total number of nested replies.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.ContributionReply.HasMoreReplies
member.summary: Whether there are nested replies.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution
member.summary: Individual root contribution in the response.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.AuthorId
member.summary: The ID of the participant who authored this contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.AuthorPseudonym
member.summary: The pseudonym of the author.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.Content
member.summary: The content of the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the contribution was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.ReplyCount
member.summary: The total number of direct replies.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.LastReplyAt
member.summary: When the last reply was posted.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContribution.HasReplies
member.summary: Whether this contribution has replies.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView
member.summary: Response model for root contributions with cursor-based pagination.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.EntityType
member.summary: The type of entity this discourse is about.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.EntityId
member.summary: The ID of the entity this discourse is about.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.Contributions
member.summary: The cursor-paginated root contributions for this entity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.TotalContributionCount
member.summary: Total number of all contributions for this entity (includes replies).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.TotalRootContributionCount
member.summary: Total number of root contributions for this entity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.TotalParticipants
member.summary: Total number of unique participants.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.DTOs.RootContributionsView.LastActivityAt
member.summary: When the last contribution was posted.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.ContributionCursorHelpers
member.summary: Shared cursor-based pagination helpers for contribution query handlers.
Combines a base specification with a cursor specification for directional pagination.
member.param: The base filter for the query.
The encoded cursor string, or for the first page.
The direction of pagination.
member.returns: The combined specification.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.ContributionCursorHelpers.ApplyDirectionalOrdering(System.Linq.IQueryable{BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView},BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection)
member.summary: Applies ordering to a contribution query based on the pagination direction.
member.param: The base queryable to order.
The direction of pagination.
member.returns: An ordered queryable.

member.summary: Executes a cursor page query, trimming the extra item used to detect more results.
member.param: The ordered query to execute.
The requested page size.
The direction of pagination, used to reverse backward pages.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The page of documents and whether more results exist beyond the page.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies
member.summary: Query to retrieve replies for a specific contribution. Supports direct replies only (one level deep) with cursor-based pagination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The contribution ID to get replies for.
The cursor to start from (null for first page).
Maximum number of replies to return (default: 5).
Direction of pagination (default: Forward).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies.ContributionId
member.summary: Gets the contribution ID to get replies for.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies.Cursor
member.summary: Gets the cursor to start from (null for first page).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies.Limit
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of replies to return.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies.Direction
member.summary: Gets the direction of pagination.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionRepliesHandler
member.summary: Efficient query handler for contribution replies using cursor-based pagination. Achieves TRUE database-level pagination by querying individual contribution documents with cursors.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionRepliesHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetContributionReplies,Marten.IQuerySession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves replies to a specific contribution based on the provided request parameters.
member.param: The request containing the contribution ID, pagination details, and direction.
The read-only query session for accessing the read model.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A with the retrieved replies, or if the contribution is not found.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions
member.summary: Query to get root contributions for a specific thread.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions.ThreadId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the thread.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions.Cursor
member.summary: Gets the cursor for pagination.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions.Limit
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of contributions to return.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions.Direction
member.summary: Gets the direction of pagination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The ID of the thread.
The cursor for pagination.
The maximum number of contributions to return.
The direction of pagination.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributionsHandler
member.summary: Query handler for getting root contributions by thread ID.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributionsHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetRootContributions,Marten.IQuerySession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of root contributions for the specified thread.
member.param: The query containing the thread ID, cursor, limit, and direction.
The read-only query session for accessing the read model.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A if the thread exists; otherwise, .

member.summary: Query to get a discourse thread by entity reference.

The ID of the entity.

member.summary: Query to get a discourse thread by entity reference.

The ID of the entity.

member.summary: The ID of the entity.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetThreadByEntityHandler
member.summary: Handler for getting a discourse thread by entity reference.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetThreadByEntityHandler.Handle(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Queries.GetThreadByEntity,Marten.IQuerySession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a discourse thread view based on the specified entity type and entity ID.
member.param: The request containing the entity type and entity ID used to identify the thread.
The read-only query session for accessing the read model.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The if found; otherwise, .

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView
member.summary: Contribution document for efficient querying of contributions and replies.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.ThreadId
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the thread this contribution belongs to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.AuthorId
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the participant who authored this contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content of the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the contribution was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.ParentContributionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the parent contribution, if this is a reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.IsRootContribution
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this contribution is a root-level contribution (not a reply).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.ReplyCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of replies to this contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView.LastReplyAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when this contribution last received a reply.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView
member.summary: Thread metadata document for querying thread-level information.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the entity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.EntityType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the entity this thread is for.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.EntityId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique entity identifier this thread is for.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the entity was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.TotalContributions
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of contributions made.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.TotalRootContributions
member.summary: Gets or sets the total contributions from all root-level entities.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.TotalParticipants
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of participants.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.LastActivityAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the timestamp of the most recent activity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView.ParticipantIds
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of participant identifiers.

member.summary: Matches replies that belong to a specific parent contribution.

member.summary: Matches replies that belong to a specific parent contribution.

member.summary: Matches root contributions in a specific thread.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Specifications.RootContributionsInThreadSpecification.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Matches root contributions in a specific thread.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Specifications.ContributionBeforeCursorSpecification
member.summary: Matches contributions that come before a cursor in descending traversal order.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Specifications.ContributionBeforeCursorSpecification.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Matches contributions that come before a cursor in descending traversal order.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Specifications.ContributionAfterCursorSpecification
member.summary: Matches contributions that come after a cursor in ascending traversal order.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.Specifications.ContributionAfterCursorSpecification.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Matches contributions that come after a cursor in ascending traversal order.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution
member.summary: Entity representing an individual contribution within a discourse thread.
Initializes a new instance of the Contribution class.
member.param: The ID of the thread this contribution belongs to.
The ID of the participant who authored this contribution.
The content of the contribution.
The ID of the parent contribution, if this is a reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.AuthorId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the participant who authored this contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.Content
member.summary: Gets the content of the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.ThreadId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the thread this contribution belongs to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.ParentContributionId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the parent contribution, if this is a reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.Status
member.summary: Gets the current status of the contribution.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when the contribution was created.
Creates a new instance of the class with the specified thread, author, content, and optional parent contribution.
member.param: The unique identifier of the thread this contribution belongs to.
The unique identifier of the participant who authored the contribution.
The content of the contribution.
The optional identifier of the parent contribution, if this contribution is a reply. Defaults to if not specified.
member.returns: A new instance initialized with the specified parameters.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Contribution.ApplyEvent(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Applies the specified domain event to update the state of the aggregate.
member.param: The domain event to apply. Must not be .
member.exception: Thrown if the type of is not recognized.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionContent
member.summary: Value object representing contribution content with validation and formatting rules.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ContributionContent class.
member.param: The content value.

member.summary: Gets the content value.

member.summary: Creates a new ContributionContent from a string value.
member.param: The content value.
member.returns: A new ContributionContent instance.

member.summary: Tries to create a new ContributionContent from a string value.
member.param: The content value.
member.returns: A new ContributionContent instance, or null if invalid.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionContent.GetEqualityComponents
member.summary: Gets the components used for equality comparison.
member.returns: The components for equality comparison.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionContent.ValidateContent(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the content value according to domain rules.
member.param: The content to validate.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionId
member.summary: Unique identifier for a .

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionStatus
member.summary: Enumeration representing the possible statuses of a contribution. Simplified to just the essential status - Published (which is the default and only status for now).

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionStatus.Published
member.summary: Contribution is published and visible.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.ContributionStatus.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ContributionStatus class.
member.param: The unique identifier for this status.
The name of this status.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Events.ContributionAdded
member.summary: Domain event emitted when a new contribution is posted to a discourse thread.
member.param: The unique identifier of the contribution.
The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.
The identifier of the thread this contribution belongs to.
The identifier of the participant who authored the contribution.
The content of the contribution.
The identifier of the parent contribution, if this is a reply.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Events.ContributionAdded.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Domain event emitted when a new contribution is posted to a discourse thread.
member.param: The unique identifier of the contribution.
The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.
The identifier of the thread this contribution belongs to.
The identifier of the participant who authored the contribution.
The content of the contribution.
The identifier of the parent contribution, if this is a reply.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Events.ContributionAdded.ThreadId

member.summary: Repository interface for contribution persistence operations.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.DiscourseThread
member.summary: Aggregate root representing a discourse thread for community discussion around an entity.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.DiscourseThread.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DiscourseThread class. For use by event sourcing reconstruction.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.DiscourseThread.#ctor(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.EntityReference)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DiscourseThread class.
member.param: Reference to the entity this discourse is about.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.DiscourseThread.EntityReference
member.summary: Gets the reference to the entity this discourse is about.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.DiscourseThread.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when the thread was created.

member.summary: Creates a new discourse thread for an entity.
member.param: Reference to the entity this discourse is about.
member.returns: A new DiscourseThread instance.

member.summary: Applies a domain event to mutate the aggregate state.
member.param: The domain event to apply.

member.summary: Registers invariants for this aggregate.

member.summary: Applies the DiscourseThreadCreated event to the aggregate state.
member.param: The event to apply.

member.summary: Invariant: entity reference must be specified.

member.summary: Unique identifier for a .

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.EntityReference.EntityId

member.summary: Tries to create a new EntityReference.
member.param: The type of entity being referenced.
The identifier of the entity being referenced.
member.returns: A new EntityReference instance, or null if invalid.

member.summary: Returns a string representation of this EntityReference.
member.returns: String representation in the format "entityType:entityId".

member.summary: Validates the entity type.

member.exception: Thrown when entity type is invalid.

member.summary: Validates the entity ID.
member.param: The entity ID to validate.
member.exception: Thrown when entity ID is invalid.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.Events.DiscourseThreadCreated
member.summary: Domain event emitted when a new discourse thread is created.
member.param: The unique identifier of the discourse thread.
The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.
The type of entity this discourse thread is about (e.g., "idea", "signal", "action").
The identifier of the entity this discourse thread is about.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.Events.DiscourseThreadCreated.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Domain event emitted when a new discourse thread is created.
member.param: The unique identifier of the discourse thread.
The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.
The type of entity this discourse thread is about (e.g., "idea", "signal", "action").
The identifier of the entity this discourse thread is about.

member.summary: Adds CommunityDiscourse bounded context services to the service collection.

The configuration instance.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.summary: Wolverine message handler for . Creates a discourse thread for the amendment entity if it doesn't already exist.
member.param: The message bus for handling asynchronous messaging.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.ContributionViewProjection
member.summary: Multi-stream projection for Contribution aggregate. Builds contribution documents and updates parent reply counts when replies are posted.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.ContributionViewProjection.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, configuring event mappings for contributions.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.ContributionViewProjection.Create(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Events.ContributionAdded)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of based on the provided data.
member.param: The object containing the data used to initialize the new .
member.returns: A new initialized with the values from the object.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.ContributionViewProjection.Apply(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.ContributionView,BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Events.ContributionAdded)
member.summary: Updates a parent contribution's reply count when a reply is posted. This method is called for parent contribution documents when a reply is created.
member.param: The parent contribution document to update.
The reply contribution event.
member.returns: The updated parent contribution document.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.DiscourseThreadViewProjection
member.summary: Multi-stream projection for DiscourseThread aggregate. Builds thread metadata and statistics by consuming events from both Thread and Contribution streams.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.DiscourseThreadViewProjection.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, configuring mappings for thread-related events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.DiscourseThreadViewProjection.Create(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.DiscourseThreads.Events.DiscourseThreadCreated)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of based on the specified event.
member.param: The event containing the data required to initialize the . This parameter cannot be .
member.returns: A new initialized with the data from the event.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Projections.DiscourseThreadViewProjection.Apply(BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Application.ReadModels.DiscourseThreadView,BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Domain.Contributions.Events.ContributionAdded)
member.summary: Updates the state of a based on a new contribution.
member.param: The to be updated. This object represents the current state of the thread.
The containing details of the new contribution to apply.
member.returns: The updated reflecting the changes made by the new contribution.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Seeding.CommunityDiscourseInitialData
member.summary: Development-only initial data seeding for Community Discourse using Marten's initial data hook. Seeds discourse events using aggregates to ensure domain logic integrity. Depends on signals and ideas being seeded first. Seed content is loaded from the embedded seed-data.json resource.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Seeding.CommunityDiscourseInitialData.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The ordered participant array shared across all seeders.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CommunityDiscourse.Infrastructure.Seeding.CommunityDiscourseInitialData.Populate(Marten.IDocumentStore,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Populates initial development data for Community Discourse.
member.param: The Marten document store.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
